title: No More Curses
description: Remove curse of vanishing and curse of binding enchantment.
body:
# No More Curses!

Have you ever found a good armor/weapon in a chest, just to find out that it has a curse enchantment on it, well this datapack is just what you need!

Curses are now not compatible with any item and **loses its effect**, also now renamed to **No Effect**.

**Available for version 1.21+**, to remove this datapack, you need to **delete the datapack folder**.
